_note: ★ 제품 단일 정본(v6.3). 홈/마엘/상세/관련/링크 파생. collection=머신키. featured/order=홈 노출·정렬. gallery/shortDescription(정체성)+usage(사용법)/description/inci 등 빈 값이면 상세에서 해당 섹션 자동 비노출(지어내기 금지). ingredients=성분 딕셔너리(1회 작성·전 제품 공유). 성분 note=(A)설명형 '중간형' 카피—hydration/soothing/revitalizing 등 소비자 표현 허용, 치료·재생보장·임상 확정형 제외, 대표 수정·확정 대상. 성분 image·detailImage=슬롯 비움(대표 제공 예정). gallery=연출컷 리네임 배선(studio 우선, 파랑/water 액센트). whatsappText=제품별 문의.

revital.label: REVITAL
revital.about: **REVITAL** is built around daily care, formulated with **PDRN** and **CICA** for lightweight **hydration** and a comfortable, revitalizing finish.

revive.label: REVIVE
revive.about: **REVIVE** is a **moisture-focused** line, formulated with **hyaluronic acid** and **EGF** for a plump, hydrated skin feel.

for-homme.label: FOR HOMME
for-homme.about: **FOR HOMME** is an **all-in-one** step, formulated with **PDRN** and **CICA** for a simple daily routine with a clean, comfortable finish.

items.name: Ampoule Toner
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile Ampoule Toner. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: A refreshing toner that preps skin with lightweight daily moisture.
items.usage: After cleansing, apply to the face and gently pat until absorbed.

items.name: Ampoule Essence
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile Ampoule Essence. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: A soft, nourishing essence for smooth and comfortable daily care.
items.usage: After toner, apply an appropriate amount and pat until absorbed.

items.name: Ampoule Mist
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile Ampoule Mist. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: A fine moisture mist for a quick, refreshing reset anytime.
items.usage: Hold 15–20cm from the face and mist as needed through the day.

items.name: Ampoule Lotion
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile Ampoule Lotion. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: A lightweight lotion that leaves skin soft and comfortably moisturized.
items.usage: As the last step, apply an appropriate amount and spread evenly.

items.name: Revital Ampoule
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile Revital Ampoule. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: A concentrated daily ampoule for hydrated, revitalized-looking skin.
items.usage: Apply a small amount before lotion over the face or areas needing focused care.

items.name: Lifting Ampoule
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile Lifting Ampoule. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: A rich moisture ampoule for smoother, firmer-looking skin.
items.usage: After toner or essence, apply a small amount and pat gently until absorbed.

items.name: All in One
items.whatsappText: Hello, I'm interested in the m'Aaile All in One. Please send me more information about partnership and ordering.
items.shortDescription: One simple step for fresh, comfortable daily care.
items.usage: After cleansing, apply an appropriate amount over the whole face.

pdrn.label: PDRN
pdrn.note: Derived from **salmon DNA**, PDRN is widely used in Korean skincare. Across m'Aaile skincare it is paired with **CICA** for daily **revitalizing care** and a comfortable finish.

cica.label: CICA
cica.note: **Centella asiatica** — known in Korea as **CICA** — carries plant components such as madecassoside. It runs through the m'Aaile line for a calm, **soothing** daily routine.

ha.label: Hyaluronic Acid
ha.note: A **hydration**-focused ingredient central to the **REVIVE** line, formulated for a plump, moisturized skin feel in daily **moisture-focused care**.

egf.label: EGF
egf.note: A skincare ingredient used in the **REVIVE** line, paired with **hyaluronic acid** for concentrated **moisture-focused care**.
